1 · Adjusted EBITDA → Unadjusted EBITDA
Walks from management-adjusted EBITDA down to statutory (unadjusted) EBITDA by normalization category. OC = normalizations tied to Company-owned/managed locations, shown as one line since it spans several categories.
2 · Unadjusted EBITDA → Free Cash Flow
Walks from statutory EBITDA (cash basis) to the actual net change in cash, using month-end balance sheet deltas. Capex is split into recurring maintenance/other vs. one-time acquisition spend.
3 · Cash Balance Trend
Month-end cash balance, walking forward from the opening balance using each month's Net Change in Cash above. Dashed lines show the 2026 Budget and Budget + Revised Proforma cash trajectories for comparison (PCS / PSSF / All companies).
